examples: But strong bonds of mutuality are not built in this way.
Everything, polished and deposited by time, eventually becomes a habit, a mutuality, a culture.
Mutuality rather than independence is the chief characteristic of human life, whatever we'd like to believe.
We are caught in an inescapable network of mutuality, tied in a single garment of destiny.
Both rely on some of the same principles: relationships, mutuality and community.
